# Website Sale Product Cart Quantity

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows to add custom quantity from the product items.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

To use this module, you need to activate the **Add to Cart** and **Always display qty buttons** option on **Products item**

## Usage

1. Select how many units of product do you want.
2. Press on "Shopping cart" button located on product item.
3. In /shop page, option Customize > "Always display qty button" allows button to be displayed not only on rollover (good option for tablets), moving buttons below images.
